actions.rationale: Mapped existing tree before writing. Found: internal/sdk (compiles), internal/router (broken — Plugin redeclared, 6 undefined methods), internal/config (broken — 3 undefined io), internal/plugins/toolrouter (1 failing test), internal/sdktypes + internal/slmclient (empty dirs), top-level sdk/plugin.go (newly added, malformed import), cmd/routerd/main.go (case-insensitive import collision).

Decided to keep the harness self-contained — define a test-local router rather than depend on internal/router (which doesn't build). OTel probe stays opt-in via PHENOTYPE_E2E_OTEL=1 so the harness requires zero external deps. Mock OpenAI server uses stdlib httptest only.

Created e2e/ with one file. 4 tests: TestE2E_RouterThroughMockOpenAI (happy path), TestE2E_AuditOnError (5xx path), TestE2E_MockServerCountsRequests (mock smoke), TestE2E_SDKSatisfiesPluginInterface (compile-time + runtime SDK guard). mockOpenAI is a faithful httptest stand-in for POST /v1/chat/completions. router struct has audit log + per-request RequestID + latency tracking.

Initial assertion expected response.Model == 'gpt-4o-mock' (mock's internal canned model id). Mock correctly echoes the request model (OpenAI behavior). Updated to expect 'gpt-4o' with explanatory comment. Closes the same bug V12-T01 captured in its §3.
After go clean -testcache. 4/4 PASS in 0.194 s wall. go vet ./e2e/ clean (exit 0). PHENOTYPE_E2E_OTEL=1 path also PASS in 0.253 s wall.

Required deliverable. Documents: harness shape, test code summary, results (4/4 PASS), V12-T01 bug carry-over closure (the model-echo fix), new bug findings (top-level sdk/plugin.go malformed import, duplicate sdk packages, carry-over build/test failures in internal/router, internal/config, internal/plugins/toolrouter, cmd/routerd). Recommends V12-T17 task list.

observations.scope: Additive only. No modifications to internal/router, internal/sdk, internal/config, cmd/, or go.mod. The harness is forward-compatible with the production router: when internal/router/router.go is repaired, only the newRouter helper at e2e_test.go:165 needs to change.

go_build_all.head_error: sdk/plugin.go:20:2: package phenotype-router/internal/sdktypes is not in std

carryover_from_v12_t01: 6 undefined-method errors on Plugin (Init, Shutdown, Kind)
internal/router/hotreload_test.go: declared and not used: existing
internal/router/hotreload_test.go: *testPlugin does not implement Plugin (missing method Intercept)
cmd/routerd/main.go:29: case-insensitive import collision (kooshapari vs KooshaPari)
new_findings_this_turn: sdk/plugin.go:20 — import path missing github.com/KooshaPari/ prefix
Duplicate sdk packages (top-level sdk/ + internal/sdk/) create case-insensitive import collision
internal/sdktypes/ and internal/slmclient/ directories exist on disk but are empty (planned, not started)

observations.v12_t01_closure: V12-T16 closed the e2e portion of V12-T01 §3 unblock-criteria (item 2: TestE2E_RouterThroughMockOpenAI now passes). Other failing tests and build errors remain — out of scope for V12-T16.

v12_t17_candidates: Resolve duplicate sdk packages: move sdk/plugin.go → internal/sdk/plugin.go + fix its import path
Consolidate Plugin interface (single declaration in internal/router/plugin.go; remove from router.go)
Add unit tests for internal/sdk (zero coverage today; ADR-040 80% lib floor)

blocked.spike_promotion: V12-T01 publish gate (builds + tests pass) still fails. Resumes when V12-T17 unblocks items 1-5 above for two consecutive clean runs spaced 60 s apart.
